query: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.role, u.dailyBillingEnabled, u.billingStartAt, u.lastDailyBillingDate, u.billingStatus, w.balance as wallet_balance, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) as nas_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN wallets w ON w.userId = u.id WHERE u.role IN ('client', 'reseller') LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT u.id, u.username, u.role, u.dailyBillingEnabled, u.billingStartAt, u.lastDailyBillingDate, u.billingStatus, w.balance as wallet_balance, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) as nas_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN wallets w ON w.userId = u.id WHERE u.role IN ('client', 'reseller') LIMIT 15;
